final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial fitness photography
Primary request: muscular athlete performing deadlift with sweat and power aesthetics
Scene/backdrop: industrial-style gym interior with exposed brick walls, metal equipment, concrete floors
Subject: muscular male athlete with defined muscle lines, intense focus, sweat droplets on skin, heavy barbell
Style/medium: fitness editorial photography, gritty industrial aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium shot, eye-level angle, capturing full body tension during deadlift
Lighting/mood: cool-toned overhead lighting with dramatic shadows, masculine and powerful atmosphere
Color palette: cool blues and grays + warm skin tones + metallic silver accents
Materials/textures: glistening sweat on skin, rough concrete, brushed steel equipment, worn leather lifting belt
Constraints: keep the industrial gym setting with exposed structural elements, emphasize muscle definition and raw power
Avoid: soft lighting, pastel colors, cartoonish proportions, clean studio backdrop, plastic skin texture
